title: Spiced Collard Green Crumble
description: A flavorful and nutritious Indian-inspired side dish made with collard greens and a sweet, crumbly topping.
instructions: 2. In a large pan, heat 2 tbsp of oil over medium heat. Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add garlic, Indian Spice Blend, salt, and black pepper to the pan and cook for an additional 1 minute.
4. Add chopped collard greens to the pan and cook until wilted, about 5 minutes.
5. Transfer the collard green mixture to a baking dish.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together the sweet crumble and crumbled Indian bread.
7. Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the collard greens.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
